flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hilbert College rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.7k → $33.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hilbert College rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.7k → $33.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Hilbert College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (47.0% vs 56.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hilbert College fell 82% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.3%).
